Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Whitman, 213.622.5555 appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff/Cross-defendant Townsend and Second Street Associates.
Mary Elizabeth Cirone, 408.286.9800 appearing via Zoom for Defendant/Cross-complainant Smule, Inc.

Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT TOWNSEND AND SECOND STREET ASSOCIATES, A MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT is DENIED. At the pleadings stage tenant's interpretation of the lease and allegations of breach are not subject to being stricken as irrelevant, improper or false under the circumstances of this case as alleged.
Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
